note: MINING DISTRIBUTION card no longer flickers between two values. The dashboard card was being written to by both updateDashboard() (every 30 s refresh, owns the 288-block rolling cache) and the panel-open IIFE (its own fresh fetch); the two windows never matched exactly, so on every refresh tick the operator saw a value bounce. The panel IIFE no longer touches the card values; only updateDashboard() owns them. NEW MANDATORY UPDATE BANNER for the staged-relief granularity fork at block 6700: drops 1 profile per 60 s starting at 600 s instead of 3 per 60 s starting at 540 s. No supply, reward, wallet, GPU or pool change. cASERT bitsQ continues to absorb any drift to the 10-minute target. Hard reload (Ctrl+Shift+R).
